nodes.name: Grey-breasted parakeet
nodes.summary: Grey-breasted parakeet（Grey-breasted parakeet，学名 Pyrrhura griseipectus），在图谱中标记为濒危（EN）物种，主要分布于Caatinga。

nodes.name: Caatinga
nodes.summary: Caatinga是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联56种鸟类，包括白腹拟䳍、黄腿穴䳍、White-browed guan等56种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: EN
nodes.summary: EN表示 IUCN 濒危等级，当前关联384种鸟类，如朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭、黑脸琵鹭等384种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It also identified earlier photographs taken in Bahia of birds that at the time were identified as the white-eared (or maroon-faced) parakeet. The Ceará population inhabits patches of tall humid forest within otherwise dry caatinga and in granite- or sandstone-dominated areas
